caption: An older man with gray hair and glasses speaks from behind a wooden podium in an indoor setting featuring a background of light-brown horizontal slats. He wears a light blue button-down shirt decorated with intricate patterns, including an eagle design, and a necklace. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. The podium displays a logo with a red floral emblem and the text "Killingly-Webster LIBRARY". To the right of the podium, the word "ORCA" appears as white text on a dark background. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in place, looking down toward the podium and speaking, with slight movements of his head and facial expressions. The heads of a few audience members are partially visible in the foreground, appearing static throughout the clip.
